parameters.command:
set -e

NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"

echo "OPENCLAW_CHECK_START"
echo "checked_at=$NOW"

echo "--- SERVICES ---"
(openclaw gateway status 2>/dev/null || true)

echo "--- DOCKER ---"
docker ps --format '{{.Names}}|{{.Image}}|{{.Status}}' | sort

echo "--- OPENCLAW BINDINGS ---"
ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':(18789|18791) ' || true

echo "--- CADDY ---"
(systemctl is-active caddy 2>/dev/null || true)
(systemctl is-enabled caddy 2>/dev/null || true)

echo "--- UPDATES ---"
systemctl is-active unattended-upgrades 2>/dev/null || true
if [ -f /var/run/reboot-required ]; then echo reboot_required=yes; else echo reboot_required=no; fi
apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | head -n 50 || true

echo "--- MEMORY ---"
ls -1 /root/.openclaw/workspace/memory 2>/dev/null | tail -n 10 || true

echo "--- RECENT ERROR LOGS ---"
docker logs --since 24h n8n-docker-caddy-n8n-1 2>/dev/null | tail -n 80 || true
